title: How to 10x Your Claude Code Projects (Karpathy's Method)
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down three strategies attributed to Andrej Karpathy for maximizing productivity with Claude Code: LLM knowledge bases, auto-research, and context engineering. The video frames these as a system for dramatically increasing development output.
